overall.description: First-person exploration of a cyberpunk ripperdoc clinic from the video game Cyberpunk 2077. The scene transitions from a pink neon-lit lounge area with a heart-shaped sign through to a green-lit medical bay with surgical equipment, featuring slow atmospheric walking and environmental interaction.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit lounge with seating and mannequin display

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the lounge toward the neon-lit display case

notable_agents.action: woman sitting on red couch looking at a handheld device

entered.detail: heart-shaped neon sign with cursive text glowing in pink
circular rug with black and white zebra pattern on the floor
plush red velvet sofa with curved wooden frame
low wooden table with magazines scattered on top
vertical pink neon light strips framing the display case
glass case with silver mannequins visible inside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit cyberpunk lounge dominated by vibrant pink neon lighting. The camera moves forward past a woman seated on a red velvet couch, approaching a display case with vertical neon tubes and a heart-shaped 'love' sign overhead.

events.description: camera turns right to face the window revealing exterior alley view between buildings

agents.ego_description: standing at the window looking out at the dark alleyway and distant neon signs

entered.detail: wooden window frame looking out to exterior
tall industrial buildings visible through the window
narrow alley between buildings with fire escapes
red glowing signage visible on distant building

segments.scene_description: The camera turns to focus on a window revealing a dark cyberpunk alleyway between industrial buildings. The pink neon lights of the lounge fade to the left as the view shifts to the exterior urban environment with distant red neon signage visible through the glass.

scene_state.functional_zone: lounge area transitioning to back corridor

events.description: turns away from window back into the lounge moving toward the back room

agents.ego_description: walking through the lounge toward the doorway leading to the clinic area

entered.detail: long blue velvet sofa against the left wall
small circular side table next to the couch
decorative art piece on the wall above the blue couch
open doorway leading to the back medical room

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the window, the camera moves through the lounge past a blue velvet couch and wall art, heading toward an open doorway. The pink neon lights shift to the right side of the frame as the camera approaches the entrance to the back room.

events.description: enters the back room revealing medical clinic with surgical chair and green lighting
dialogue interaction prompt appears to talk with seated ripperdoc

agents.ego_description: moving around the clinic examining the surgical chair and medical equipment before approaching the seated character

notable_agents.action: ripperdoc seated in chair with glowing yellow neon outline

entered.detail: medical examination chair with white padding and metal frame
tall medical device with screens and controls
horizontal green neon tubes illuminating the walls
medical sink with counter and cabinets
large circular red neon light installation on the wall
small table with medical tools and supplies

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a medical clinic room illuminated by green neon strips, featuring a central surgical chair and medical monitoring equipment. The camera circles the room examining the clinical setup before approaching a seated ripperdoc with a glowing neon outline, where a dialogue prompt appears.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant, pink-lit cyberpunk lounge that transitions into a sterile, green-hued medical clinic. It begins by gliding past a woman on a red velvet couch toward a heart-shaped neon sign, before turning toward a window that reveals a dark, industrial alleyway with distant red signage. As the camera pivots away from the exterior view, it moves past blue velvet furniture and wall art, with the pink neon lighting receding to the side as it approaches an open doorway. The scene then shifts abruptly into a clinical environment illuminated by green neon strips, where the camera circles a central surgical chair and monitoring equipment. Finally, the movement concludes by approaching a seated ripperdoc with a glowing neon outline as a dialogue prompt appears.
